narrative: Valuation review of instrument OTC-SWAP-338 (Level 3, income approach) for as-of 2026-07-15 raised 6 findings across independent price verification, valuation adjustments, input traceability and freshness, override governance, and Level 3 uncertainty disclosure. Two findings are high severity: an IPV variance of 3.20% above the 1.00% tolerance with no documented rationale, and a manual override that lacks a recorded approver. Suggested disposition: Escalate to the Valuation Control Committee and the responsible product-control reviewer. Every finding cites the specific valuation-record evidence behind it. This output is valuation-review evidence only; it is not a valuation sign-off, override approval, or fair-value determination, and no value has been posted or approved. Weigh the review considerations before reaching any conclusion.
